name: Florentines
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the almond, candied fruit, and peel mixture.
2. In a bowl combine almonds, fruits, and peels; set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan combine butter, milk, sugar, and honey. Bring to a full rolling boil, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the almond mixture. Stir in 1/4 cup flour (adding more if the mixture is too liquid).
5. Drop by level tablespoonfuls, at least 3 inches apart, onto a greased and floured baking sheet. Prepare only 6 cookies at a time on separate baking sheets.
6. Using the back of a spoon, spread each dough ball into 3-inch circles.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes. Remove from oven and let stand 1 minute on the baking sheet.
8. Carefully remove with a spatula to waxed paper and cool completely.
9. In a small saucepan melt chocolate pieces and shortening over low heat.
10. When cookies are cooled, evenly spread about 1 teaspoon of the chocolate mixture on the bottom of each cookie.
11. When the chocolate is almost set, draw wavy lines through it with the tines of a fork.
12. Store cookies, covered, in the refrigerator.
Yield: 28 cookies
